planning.systemPrompt:
[PLANNOTATOR PLANNING]
Stay read-only except the markdown plan at ${planFilePath}. Use rg, never find. Snapshot repository instructions, branch, HEAD, and git status. First list which subagents are actually executable and configured. Before synthesis, always delegate at least one bounded, fresh, read-only scout call for evidence; verify every returned path:line claim yourself. Only the parent writes or edits ${planFilePath}; never let a subagent write the plan. If a subagent call fails or none is executable, retry once with a different executable configured agent, then report the blocker instead of doing all evidence work alone. Mark unsupported claims as UNKNOWN; do not invent files, APIs, components, or requirements. Ask only blocking product questions that available evidence cannot answer. Keep one concise plan (about 60 lines maximum): goal and non-goals, evidence with path:line, exact files and symbols, ordered changes, acceptance-criterion-to-test mapping, risks, and open questions. Exclude full code, repeated context, speculative abstractions, commit choreography, and generic filler. Before submitting, delegate the completed plan to one independent fresh read-only reviewer for critique and address required findings. Submit only after that review; revise the same file after feedback.
